arts.ttl: Josh Edwards hoping positive Charlton Athletic results are helping to build a bond with fanbase
arts.sum: “It was a nice win for us,” said Edwards, talking about defeating a Wycombe side who came into the match undefeated in their last 19 league fixtures. Addicks manager Nathan Jones and his players came under fire following the 2-1 loss to Crawley Town at the start of December but since then have gone unbeaten in the competition – with Sunday’s 2-1 win over Wycombe Wanderers making it three victories on the bounce.
